summary: Backend smoke + integration test on all 13 requested areas of the CohortData Hiring Portal API. All 34 assertions passed (public jobs listing/detail, applications, HR auth + JWT, HR job CRUD, invite lifecycle, candidate exam fetch/start/submit including Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI-risk scoring, submission retrieval, stats, enriched applications). No blockers.
passed: GET /api/jobs returns 7 seeded jobs sorted by created_at desc
GET /api/jobs/{id} returns assignment_summary (mcq_count, sa_count, has_coding, duration_minutes) and does NOT leak 'assignment' or correct answers
POST /api/applications 200 with id for valid job; 404 for invalid job id
POST /api/auth/login hr@cohortdata.com/Cohort@2026 returns token + user with role=hr_admin; wrong password -> 401
GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token returns HR user
HR CRUD /api/hr/jobs POST/PUT/DELETE work with Bearer; POST without auth -> 403; default assignment auto-attached
POST /api/hr/invite creates one-time token; repeat call returns {existing: true, token: <same>}
GET /api/exam/{token} returns candidate_name/job_title/duration_minutes/mcqs/short_answers/coding; mcqs stripped of correct_index; invalid token -> 404
POST /api/exam/start marks in_progress and returns ok
POST /api/exam/submit returns submission_id + mcq_score + ai_risk_avg (valid int 0-100 or -1); second submit -> 410
GET /api/hr/applications enriched with invite_sent, submission_id, ai_risk_avg, violation_count
